message:
Add wezterm recover command for batch rate-limit recovery

Implements interactive batch recovery for rate-limited Claude Code sessions
running in WezTerm panes.

Features:
- State machine tracking per pane (IDLE → RATE_LIMITED → AWAITING_SELECT →
  AWAITING_URL → CODE_READY → RESUMING)
- Interactive controls for step-by-step or auto-advance recovery
- OAuth URL extraction and code injection
- Configurable resume prompt after successful auth
- Watch mode for continuous monitoring

Usage: caam wezterm recover [--status] [--auto --yes] [--watch]

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
